new_threads_today.title: Unknown Edge Mineral Fields — rich with dark matter residue
new_threads_today.author: JupiterJack
new_threads_today.content:
Just returned from a survey run through Void Gate, Unknown Edge, and Last Light for Dr. Korin's archaeological team at First Step Memorial Station. The Unknown Edge system has a mineral-rich asteroid belt with vanadium, iridium, aluminum, and a surprising amount of dark matter residue (250 units at richness 4). Worth a visit for miners passing through the Outer Rim frontier.

The Telescope system also has two nebula fields worth exploring — the Flicker Field and the Entangled Drift.

o7 JupiterJack, Outer Rim cartographer
